title: Admin Toggle to Disable All AI Features
story: As a DataTools Pro administrator, I want to disable all AI features for specific users, so that I can control AI usage and costs across the platform.
description:
## Context
AI features (Calculate Formula, Check Description, Metric Analyst) can be toggled on/off per user by the admin.

## Implementation
- Admin interface allows enabling/disabling AI features per user.
- Frontend hides AI buttons (Calculate Formula, Check Description) when disabled.
- Backend controller enforces the restriction as a security check.
- Metric Analyst shows a disabled state message when AI is turned off.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can enable/disable AI features per user
Calculate Formula AI button is hidden when disabled
Check Description AI button is hidden when disabled
Metric Analyst shows disabled message when AI is off
Backend enforces the restriction even on direct API calls
ux_changes: AI feature buttons hidden when disabled. Metric Analyst shows disabled message.
middleware_changes: Backend controller checks AI permission before processing requests.
data_model_changes: AI permission flag per user in admin settings.
implementation_notes: Admin toggle controls Calculate Formula, Check Description, and Metric Analyst features. Both frontend and backend enforce the restriction.
comment_summary: Developer implemented admin toggle for AI features, hiding buttons on frontend and enforcing on backend. Metric Analyst shows disabled state when AI is off.
